modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Warning message appears for emails from new senders.

full_description_text: So, like, I got this email from someone I don’t know, right? And there’s this weird warning at the top saying, “You don’t often get email from email@address.com.” It’s kinda annoying, honestly. I mean, I get it’s a new address, but do I really need a reminder about it?
short_description: Warning message appears for emails from new senders.
description: So, like, I got this email from someone I don’t know, right? And there’s this weird warning at the top saying, “You don’t often get email from email@address.com.” It’s kinda annoying, honestly. I mean, I get it’s a new address, but do I really need a reminder about it?
